name: Solaire 8250 Georgia
bathroomsNote: 2BR units come with 2 baths across all listed floor plans (B2, B6a, B4).

notes.doormanDetail: Property advertises '24-hour concierge service' and a 'Mobile Doorman App.' Leasing office hours are Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm, Sun 12pm-5pm. Whether a physical concierge is staffed overnight is not confirmed in available sources; classified as 'Likely staffed' rather than 'Confirmed 24h.'
notes.balconyDetail: Private balconies available on select units only, not standard across all homes.
notes.packageDetail: Package Concierge Locker Service available; resident reviews note packages are secure.
notes.unitClimateDetail: Air conditioning listed as an in-unit amenity; specific thermostat/HVAC control type (in-unit vs. building-controlled) not confirmed in sources, but modern luxury apartment context and in-unit AC listing indicate resident-controlled.
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Majority of reviews describe the building as clean and well-kept; maintenance team responsive to requests. One source noted grounds rated below average. Overall assessment is positive.
